suite.name: registerUser

test.name: Cadastrar um usuário sem nome sendo um Administrador

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/rafael/Documentos/Compass/FrontServeRest-RoboteXpress/logs/browser/traces/temp/7d54e5a6-f31b-4a7c-b821-d86da7f6043b"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://compassuolfront.serverest.dev/
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//span[text()='Nome é obrigatório'] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

suite.doc: Ações e elementos da página de criação de usuário como um Administrador
